issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for setup and runtime failures.

scenarios.name: setup-appium-environment
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes all required commands, while Response A omits the driver installs, list, and doctor commands.

scenarios.name: webdriverio-login-test
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric, using the required selector syntax and assertion method, though it still lacks the second test and proper describe name.
